title: Premier Decorations Santa Stop Here Sign
features: 1M Garden Stake - Santa Pleast Stop Here Sign
description: This Christmas Decoration Santa Please Stop Here Garden Stake is made of wood and painted and decorated with glitter. The wording is Santa Stop Here, and features a painted and glitter decorated Santa. This item measures approximately 1M in height and the decoration part of the stake measures approximately 21cm in width and 37cm in height at the widest and tallest points.
